design_archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) - Modified for High Utility
core_principles: High Utility & Glanceability: Information must be readable from 1-2 meters away (Wandtablet Mode).
Massive Touch Targets: Core actions require min 64px hit areas to accommodate dirty hands (kitchen) or quick tapping (supermarket).
Warm but Functional: Appetizing earthy accents without generic food-blog clutter (no cursive fonts, no messy layouts).
Bento Dashboard: Clear, structured, widget-based navigation for the central hub.
Responsive Contexts: Drastically different layouts for Desktop (Admin/Planning), Tablet (Kitchen/Cooking), and Mobile (Shopping).

rules: No purple or teal. No generic tech-slop gradients.
Never use pure black or pure white. #FFFFFF is allowed for cards on the #FAF8F5 background to create soft contrast.
Primary color (Terracotta) is reserved for primary CTAs, active states, and critical highlights.

hierarchy.labels: text-xs sm:text-sm font-bold tracking-[0.1em] uppercase text-[#6B655C]

rules: Avoid Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk.
Use strong weight contrast (e.g., Bold headings vs Regular body).
Left-align content for readability, especially for ingredients and steps.

grid_strategy.kitchen_tablet: grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 with large widget spans (Bento layout)
grid_strategy.supermarket_list: flex flex-col space-y-4 (single column, full width)

buttons.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center font-bold tracking-wide transition-transform active:scale-95 rounded-2xl

cards_and_widgets.kitchen_tile: aspect-square or aspect-[4/3] flex flex-col justify-between hover:border-[#C8553D] transition-colors

checkboxes.supermarket_mode: h-12 w-12 sm:h-10 sm:w-10 rounded-xl border-2 border-[#E5DFD3] data-[state=checked]:bg-[#C8553D] data-[state=checked]:border-[#C8553D] transition-all
checkboxes.label: text-xl sm:text-lg cursor-pointer select-none

surfaces.glassmorphism: Avoid glassmorphism. Use solid colors for maximum contrast and legibility.
surfaces.navigation: Sticky top or bottom bar (mobile) with solid background #FFFFFF and border-b/border-t #E5DFD3.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Subtle -translate-y-1 on desktop cards. Background darkening on buttons.
motion_and_interaction.active_states: Distinct scale-95 down-press effect for physical feedback on touch devices.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Fast and responsive (duration-200 ease-out). No slow, blocking animations.

media_assets.icons_library: lucide-react (stroke-width: 2.5 for better visibility on tablets)

images.description: Warm minimalist kitchen interior (use for empty states or hero headers)
Fresh vegetables and herbs flatlay (use for missing recipe images or pantry headers)

testing_rules.data_testid: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, checkboxes, list items) MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='shopping-list-checkbox-tomato').

instructions_for_main_agent: Use German (Deutsch) as the primary language for all UI text, placeholders, and dummy data.
Implement distinct responsive views: A sidebar/complex layout for Desktop, but a large-tiled Bento layout for Tablet, and a highly simplified vertical list for Mobile.
When building the Shopping List (Supermarkt-Modus), ensure checkboxes are massive (min 48x48px, preferably larger) and text is large enough to read while moving.
When building the Kitchen Tablet Mode (Kochmodus), ensure recipe steps are displayed in large typography (text-2xl or 3xl) with massive 'Next Step' targets.

Use standard HTML divs and sections styled with Tailwind for the dashboard bento grid. Use shadcn/ui for complex interactive components (Select, Dialog) but override their padding and sizes to match the generous spacing system.
Do not use card components everywhere; allow some flat, cardless lists for density where needed (like the admin panel).
